news.summary: AI technology is being integrated into the Sweat app's crypto rewards system, rewarding users for their physical activity with cryptocurrency tokens. The app, which facilitates payments based on the number of steps taken by individuals, is expanding its token to other blockchain networks.
news.headline: 'Sweat' app, rewarding steps with crypto, now integrates AI as tokens spread to more blockchains in expansion.

news.summary: ALX Oncology Holdings Inc. is advancing a pipeline of novel cancer therapies. They reported financial results for Q1 2025, with cash, cash equivalents, and investments at $107.0 million, sufficient for operations into Q4 2026. They received FDA clearance for EGFR-targeted antibody-drug conjugate ALX2004, initiating Phase 1 trials in mid-2025. The company will not pursue U.S. registration in gastric cancer but is focused on clinical programs in breast and colorectal cancers. Milestones are expected in 2026 for these programs. The company has extended its cash runway and plans clinical milestones for breast cancer, colorectal cancer, and ALX2004 in the near future.
news.headline: ALX Oncology reports Q1 2025 financial results, extending cash runway to Q4 2026, focusing on evorpacept and ALX2004 studies, with $107.0 million in cash.

news.summary: MDU Resources Group, Inc. reported record first quarter earnings with a 13.9% increase in pipeline segment earnings and an 11.5% increase in natural gas distribution earnings. The company affirmed its 2025 guidance with earnings per share expected to be in the range of $0.88 to $0.98. The electric segment earned $15.0 million, down from $17.9 million in 2024, while the natural gas distribution segment earned $44.7 million, up from $40.1 million. The pipeline segment reported earnings of $17.2 million, up from $15.1 million in 2024. MDU Resources is transitioning to a fully regulated energy delivery company and remains focused on executing its long-term growth plan. Regulatory activities and customer growth are expected to drive continued performance. The company will discuss its first quarter results during a webcast and is focused on delivering value through its CORE strategy.
news.headline: MDU Resources reports strong Q1 2025: Net income $82.0M, EPS $0.40. Pipeline earnings up 13.9%, nat gas distribution up 11.5%.confirming guidance: EPS $0.88-$0.98. Transitioning to regulated energy delivery. Regulatory updates in multiple states for electric, gas segments. Segment earnings: Electric- $15.0M, down 16%, Nat Gas Dist - $44.7M, up 11.5%, Pipeline - $17.2M, up 13.9%. Various projects in pipeline segment. Full-year EPS guided between $0.88-$0.98. Conference call scheduled. MDU Resources Group, Inc. aims to deliver value through CORE strategy.
BoE's Ramsden: The MPC are starting considerations now about QT over next year.

news.summary: In a significant development, the widely popular travel show Raw Travel TV by AIM Tell-A-Vision® Group (AIM TV) has secured renewals in key markets across 95% of the United States. The producers disclosed that the show's renewal spans over 179 cities, affirming its continued success and viewership. This renewal marks the path for more exciting and unfiltered adventures to be showcased in the upcoming season.
news.headline: Raw Travel TV season 13 (2025-26) approved with renewals in 95% of U.S. markets, promising more adventures in 179 cities.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, ABI Research, a leading global technology intelligence company, recognized eight satellite operators as "Hot Tech Innovators" in the satellite IoT sector. These operators have significantly advanced the satellite IoT industry through their groundbreaking contributions.
news.headline: ABI Research names 8 top satellite operators as "Hot Tech Innovators" in IoT market, including Globalstar, Iridium, EchoStar Mobile.

news.summary: BioDlink celebrates Junshi Biosciences' achievement of obtaining IND approval from China's NMPA for JS212, the company's inaugural bispecific ADC. JS212 merges dual-targeting antibody technology with a cytotoxic payload, marking a significant advancement in therapeutics. This milestone underscores the collaboration between BioDlink and Junshi Biosciences, highlighting the promising future of this innovative treatment.
news.headline: BioDlink celebrates Junshi Biosciences' IND approval of JS212, a bispecific ADC candidate, advancing new dual-targeting antibody tech in China; represents a next-generation therapeutic.

news.summary: The Ocean Park Apartments preservation project in NYC ensures the continued availability of essential affordable housing in a neighborhood with limited supply and high potential for residents. Tredway, a developer specializing in affordable and mixed-income housing, is leading the initiative. This effort is crucial in maintaining affordability amidst rising real estate prices and scarcity of housing options. The project safeguards a significant number of homes for individuals and families in need of economical housing solutions, contributing to the overall stability of the community.
news.headline: Tredway secures Ocean Park Apartments in Far Rockaway, Queens, preserving affordable housing in NYC. - MAY 8, 2025

news.summary: Recently released data, featured in JMIR, highlights the effectiveness of tailored messages promoting flu vaccinations among Dario members living with diabetes. The study showcases how personalized messaging significantly motivates individuals to get vaccinated. DarioHealth Corp. (NASDAQ: DRIO), a prominent player in the worldwide digital health sector, announced these findings from New York on May 8, 2025. This underscores the crucial role of targeted communication in healthcare, potentially improving vaccination rates and overall public health.
news.headline: New study shows personalized messaging from DarioHealth increased flu vaccine awareness in high-risk groups.
High-grade TREO samples found in American Rare Earths channel sampling program, up to 13,651 ppm.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Zoomd Technologies Ltd. (TSX.V: ZOMD), a leading player in mobile-centric performance marketing globally, shared its excitement about sponsoring and joining MAU Vegas 2025. MAU Vegas is the top conference for mobile app expansion and marketing, scheduled for May.
news.headline: Zoomd will sponsor and present at MAU Vegas 2025, a key mobile app growth conference. TSX.V: ZOMD.

news.summary: Autobooks is set to receive a significant funding boost, enabling the company to broaden its market reach, strengthen its financial technology solutions, and back its growth strategies. The investment comes from Runway Growth Capital LLC, a prominent provider of growth loans based in MENLO PARK, Calif. The funding announcement was made on May 8, 2025, according to information released via PRNewswire. This financial support is crucial for Autobooks as it aims to capitalize on market opportunities and accelerate its expansion plans.
news.headline: Runway invests $40M in Autobooks for strategic growth & acquire Allied Payment Network. Expands market presence.

news.summary: Lori Tierney, with extensive expertise and experience, joins ACTO to propel the life sciences sector towards an AI-focused future. The company revealed on May 8, 2025, that they've gained a valuable addition. ACTO, known for its Intelligent Field Excellence (IFE) platform powered by AI for life sciences, is set to benefit from Tierney's leadership. This news comes as a significant development for ACTO, marking a strategic move to stay at the forefront of industry innovation.
news.headline: Former J&J President, Lori Tierney, joins ACTO's Board of Directors to drive AI advancements in life sciences industry.

news.summary: Starwood Capital Group has revealed plans to extend its $30 billion real asset credit platform to the insurance sector. The announcement was made in Miami Beach, Florida on May 8, 2025. Rob Allard has been appointed as the Chief Investment Officer for Starwood Insurance Strategies in light of this new development.
news.headline: Starwood Capital appoints Rob Allard as CIO of Starwood Insurance Strategies, plans to open $30B platform to insurance industry.

news.summary: Metamagnetics Inc., a rapidly expanding defense technology startup, recently unveiled a new product line specifically tailored for applications within aerospace and defense systems. This innovative line showcases a groundbreaking design feature, setting it apart from competitors by being entirely constructed without the use of rare-earth magnets. The company, based in MARLBOROUGH, Mass., made this announcement on May 8, 2025. This move marks a significant advancement within the industry, providing enhanced solutions without relying on rare-earth materials.
news.headline: Metamagnetics launches self-biased circulators for aerospace/defense systems without rare-earth magnets.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Oklahoma City, the Board of Trustees of ETF Series Solutions announced the closure and liquidation of the Range Cancer Therapeutics ETF. This decision was made following a recommendation from Exchange Traded Concepts, LLC, the investment adviser to the fund. The liquidation process will commence immediately.
news.headline: Range Cancer Therapeutics ETF to be closed and liquidated by Exchange Traded Concepts due to Board's decision.

news.summary: In Southlake, Texas, on May 8, 2025, Sabre Corporation (NASDAQ: SABR), a prominent international travel technology firm, disclosed the selection of Jennifer Catto as Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer. Jennifer is set to join Sabre's Executive Leadership Team, bringing her expertise to the company as it forges ahead in the industry.
news.headline: Sabre names Jennifer Catto EVP and CMO; part of Executive Leadership Team.

news.summary: In Portland, Maine on May 8, 2025, Squier's Specialty Elixirs, a company founded by a chef focusing on cannabis-infused food and beverages, unveiled their latest line of creative seltzers. The company aims to revolutionize the concept of wellness through their offerings. The new range of seltzers comes in bottled form, expanding their product offerings.
news.headline: Chef-founded cannabis-infused company, Squier's Specialty Elixirs, launches new range of seltzers, cocktails, mixers, gummies.

news.summary: A community event will take place on May 10th at Bethel Church of God in Memphis, Tennessee, aiming to improve pregnancy safety and promote healthier babies in West Tennessee. Scheduled from 11:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m., the event will bring together health experts, local leaders, and families.
news.headline: Community baby shower in Memphis on May 10 aims to tackle high infant mortality rates with resources and hope. Free event at Bethel COGIC to promote safer pregnancies and healthier babies in West Tennessee.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Orlando, Florida, LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH), a prominent supplier of advanced optics and imaging systems for defense and commercial use, revealed its plan to unveil financial outcomes to the public.
news.headline: LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH) will host Q3 earnings call on May 15, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

news.summary: Cove Capital Investments, LLC (Cove Capital) has successfully finalized the purchase of the Essential Net Lease 89 portfolio. This acquisition includes two last-mile industrial distribution assets situated in strategically efficient supply chain locations. The transaction was completed in Los Angeles on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Cove Capital Investments buys two industrial assets debt-free for Essential Net Lease Trust 89.

news.summary: Global Payments Inc., a prominent payment technology and software solutions provider, revealed today that Cameron Bready, the CEO, will participate in a live presentation at the J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference on May 13 at 1:50 p.m. EDT in Boston, MA. The event can be accessed via a live webcast on the company's website at investors.globalpayments.c. Global Payments Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GPN.
news.headline: Global Payments CEO Cameron Bready to present at J.P. Morgan conference on May 13 at 1:50 pm EDT in Boston. Live webcast available. $GPN.
Lantern Pharma will announce Q1 2025 results on May 15, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) from Boston introduced its innovative 'smart desktop' platform, LINK, as part of the GlobalLINK trading platforms series, incorporating the initial third-party integration. EMAlpha, renowned for its multilingual AI-driven information flow scanning and summarization tool, will offer its services through the LINK platform. This integration aims to equip LINK users, including trading and investment experts, with valuable currency-related insights in real-time from global sources. It provides professionals with the capability to promptly access and respond to critical global information.
news.headline: State Street's LINK platform integrates EMAlpha's multilingual AI Co-Pilot for currency insights to aid trading professionals.

news.summary: Greenville, South Carolina—Leading hybrid distributor ScanSource, Inc. (NASDAQ: SCSC) disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. In Q3 FY25, net sales amounted to $704,847, reflecting a 6.3% decrease from the previous year's $752,599. Gross profit for the same period increased to $100,202 from $94,481, equating to a 6.1% growth. The gross profit margin also saw an uptick, rising from 12.6% to 14.2%, a 166 basis point increase.
news.headline: ScanSource, Inc. reported Q3 results with net sales of $704.8M (down 6.3%) and gross profit of $100.2M (up 6.1%) in FY25.

news.summary: DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. revealed that they are offering the NVIDIA RTX 4000 Ada Generation, NVIDIA RTX 6000 Ada Generation, and NVIDIA L40S GPUs to customers as DigitalOcean GPU Droplets. These GPUs are now accessible for use, providing access to NVIDIA's advanced computing capabilities with top-notch graphics and media acceleration. This move expands DigitalOcean's platform, enhancing its services with these cutting-edge GPUs.
news.headline: DigitalOcean partners with NVIDIA to offer customers RTX 4000, RTX 6000, and L40S GPUs as GPU Droplets.

news.summary: In April, market volatility increased due to rising tariff tensions and macroeconomic uncertainty, causing the S&P 500 to decline by 0.8%. The technology sector also exhibited a slowdown, with only four tech companies in the top 10 most heavily shorted large-cap securities, down from eight in February. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF made its debut in the top 10 during this period.
news.headline: Market volatility rose in April, S&P 500 dropped 0.8%. Tech sector cools, only 4 names in top 10 crowded shorts. SPDR ETF listed.

news.summary: In 2024, U.S. homebuyers obtained 86,604 mortgages for second homes, marking the lowest recorded number since 2018 and a 5% decrease from the previous year. This data was revealed by a recent report from Redfin, a technology-based real estate firm. The analysis, based on Home Mortgage Disclosure Act information from 2018 to 2024, encompasses acquisitions of second homes, primary residences, and investment properties. It is worth noting that the terminology "vacation home" was utilized in the study.
news.headline: Demand for vacation homes drops to lowest level since at least 2018; only 86,604 mortgages taken out for second homes in 2024, down 5% from previous year as per Redfin report.

news.summary: Sidus Space (NASDAQ: SIDU) revealed plans to conduct a conference call on Thursday, May 15, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss its first quarter financial results. The call can be accessed live via phone by dialing +1-877-269-7751 (U.S. Toll-Free) or +1-201-389-0908 (International), or through a webcast. Sidus Space is a pioneering company in the space industry, known for enabling innovative and agile space missions. This announcement signifies an important step for the company in sharing its financial performance with investors and the public.
news.headline: Sidus Space to hold Q1 financial results conference call on May 15 at 5:00 p.m. ET. Call details: +1-877-269-7751 (U.S.) or +1-201-389-0908 (Intl).

news.summary: Premier, Inc. revealed that its management team will engage in a fireside chat at the BofA Securities Healthcare Conference on May 13, 2025, at 9:20 a.m. PDT (12:20 p.m. EDT). This leading healthcare improvement company, listed as NASDAQ: PINC, is known for its technology-driven approach. A live audio webcast link and event replay will be accessible in the Investors segment of Premier, Inc.'s website: https://investors.premierinc.com/overview/
news.headline: Premier, Inc. to attend BofA Securities Healthcare Conference on May 13, 2025, 9:20 am PDT. Details at https://investors.premierinc.com/overview/

news.summary: Woodstock, Illinois - OWC is at the forefront of advancing towards App-First Customer Experiences (CX), establishing a new standard for customer engagement in the hardware industry. With this shift, OWC is revolutionizing the way customers interact with their products, enhancing connectivity and personalization. By focusing on app-centric approaches, OWC aims to provide seamless and tailored experiences to its customers, setting a benchmark for the hardware sector. This innovative strategy is reshaping the landscape of customer engagement, emphasizing the importance of digital platforms in fostering stronger relationships with consumers.
news.headline: OWC launches "My OWC" app for streamlined customer experience, leading in hardware tech. Influencing CX with new app.

news.summary: Approximately 2,500 people have been affected by the recent outbreak, with 150 confirmed cases of the virus. Health officials are urging the public to take preventive measures, such as wearing masks and practicing proper hygiene, to avoid further spread of the illness. The government has allocated $500,000 for emergency response efforts to address the situation. This outbreak serves as a reminder of the importance of vaccination and staying informed about public health measures.
news.headline: Birchtech Corp. will hold Q1 2025 earnings call on May 15, 5:00 p.m. EST.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, GAMCO Investors, Inc. (Gabelli) disclosed their financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company is based in Greenwich, Connecticut, and its stock trades under the symbol OTCQX: GAMI. This update likely includes essential figures on revenue, profit, and possibly any noteworthy changes in the company's operations during the specified timeframe.
news.headline: GAMCO Investors, Inc. reported its Q1 2025 results with ending March 31, 2025. OTQCX: GAMI.

news.summary: Beyond, Inc. (NYSE:BYON), the parent company of Bed Bath & Beyond, Overstock, buybuy BABY, and a blockchain asset portfolio, has revealed the reopening of buybuy BABY's online platform just before Mother’s Day. The event introduces a ‘Welcome Baby’ program with a redesigned digital shopping experience providing customers exclusive access to high-quality infant and toddler products. The relaunch campaign includes various promotions and offers.
news.headline: Beyond, Inc. relaunches buybuy BABY online days before Mother’s Day. Offers premium baby gear through a new digital shopping experience.
BoE Gov. Bailey: We do have to watch pricing by multinational companies affected by higher tariffs.

news.summary: Badger Technologies, a division of Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL), introduced its new Digital Teammate solution in Nicholasville, Kentucky. The platform features an advanced autonomous robot that boosts employee efficiency by leveraging mobile data, analytics, computer vision, and AI. This innovative solution combines software and hardware to benefit businesses.
news.headline: Badger Tech launches Digital Teammate platform with multipurpose autonomous robot, enhancing productivity. #KY #Jabil #AI

news.summary: A company called Beyond, Inc. (NYSE:BYON) based in Murray, Utah, which owns popular brands like Bed Bath & Beyond and Overstock, as well as a blockchain asset portfolio, has made an announcement regarding its subsidiary, Zion Peaks, Inc. They have initiated their inaugural crowdfunding offering for a tokenized digital security tied to select buybuy BABY intellectual property. Beyond, Inc.'s Executive Chairman and Principal Executive Officer, Marcus Lemonis, expressed enthusiasm for this move, describing it as the launch of their second tokenized venture.
news.headline: Beyond, Inc. launched 'BABY' digital asset security on tZERO platform with tokenized buybuy BABY IP, marking a significant move in their blockchain asset portfolio growth. Marcus Lemonis, Executive Chairman of Beyond, Inc., expressed excitement about the launch.

news.summary: In Atlanta, Manhattan Associates Inc. (NASDAQ: MANH) revealed that Pet Supplies Plus, a top pet food and supplies retailer, has opted for Manhattan Active® Supply Chain Planning (SCP). This move is aimed at streamlining all supply chain operations, offering a consolidated system from demand prediction to the ultimate delivery to their outlets and customers. This shift will lead to enhanced flexibility through unified planning and improved forecast precision utilizing AI-generated insights.
news.headline: Pet Supplies Plus integrates Manhattan Active® Supply Chain Planning to streamline supply chain processes, enhancing forecasting accuracy and agility.

news.summary: Exagen Inc., a prominent provider of autoimmune testing solutions, disclosed the pricing details of its recent underwritten public offering on May 8, 2025. The offering involved 3,350,000 shares of its common stock priced at $5.25 per share. The total gross proceeds to Exagen from this offering are anticipated to be $17,587,500 before deductions for underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering expenses. Additionally, Exagen has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to 502,500 additional shares on the same terms. The closing of this offering is set for May 9, 2025, contingent upon meeting standard closing conditions.
news.headline: Exagen Inc. prices public offering of 3,350,000 shares at $5.25 each, expecting gross proceeds of $17,587,500.

news.summary: Vimeo, a major private video network globally, was recently acknowledged for its video innovation and other accomplishments. The company, listed on NASDAQ as VMEO, has received various awards and distinctions. Notably, Vimeo made it to Fast Company's prestigious World’s Most Innovative Companies 2025 list earlier this year. This recognition underscores Vimeo's prominent position in the industry and its commitment to pushing the boundaries of video technology.
news.headline: Vimeo praised for video innovation, wins awards from G2, Digiday, & Webby Awards; named in Fast Company's Top Innovative Companies 2025.
